content.speakerText: Hi, I'm here for my appointment. My name's Tom Chen.
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我来就诊，我叫汤姆·陈。

options.text: I'm here to see the doctor. My name is Tom Chen.
I need to buy medicine. My name is Tom Chen.
Can you tell me the time? I'm Tom Chen.
I lost my appointment card. I'm Tom Chen.

content.explanation: 正确选项准确回应了报到就诊的意图，使用了标准表达 'I'm here for my appointment'。干扰项分别涉及买药、问时间、丢失预约卡，这些与挂号登记的初始报到行为无关。

content.speakerText: Welcome! Could you please confirm your full name and appointment time?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎！请确认您的全名和预约时间。

options.text: I'm Tom Chen. Appointment at 3 PM.
I think my appointment is tomorrow.
Can I reschedule? I'm Tom Chen.

content.explanation: 正确选项简洁准确地提供了姓名和预约时间，符合挂号登记的响应规范。干扰项涉及改约、不确定时间、提及医生，这些都不是对基本信息确认的直接回应。

content.speakerText: I'm here for my first visit. What do I need to do?
content.speakerTextCn: 我是第一次来，我需要做什么？

options.text: Please fill out this registration form with your name, date of birth, and insurance info.
You should call ahead next time to book an appointment.
The doctor will see you in 10 minutes.
Can I pay now? I'm ready.

content.explanation: 正确选项提供了挂号登记阶段的标准流程指引，包括填写表格所需信息。干扰项涉及预约提醒、就诊时间、付款，这些都不是初次报到时的首要步骤。

content.template: I'd like ___ check in for my appointment.
content.hint: 表达‘想要做某事’的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: would like to do（挂号场景核心句型）

content.template: Could you please help me ___ this form?
content.hint: 挂号时填写表格的常用动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（fill out a form）

content.hint: 预约时间的常见表达，参考对话中的3 PM

content.speakerText: Hi, I'm here for my appointment. My name's Tom Chen.
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我来就诊，我叫汤姆·陈。
expectedAnswers: I'm Tom Chen. Appointment at 3 PM.
Good afternoon. I'm Tom Chen, scheduled for a checkup.
Tom Chen. I booked at three o'clock.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确报出姓名和预约时间
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用简洁口语化表达，符合诊所场景

content.speakerText: Welcome! Can you confirm your full name and date of birth?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎！请确认您的全名和出生日期？
expectedAnswers: My name is Tom Chen. I was born on May 15th, 1990.
Tom Chen. My birthday is May 15, 1990.
I'm Tom Chen. Date of birth: May 15, 1990.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整提供姓名和出生日期
语言准确性：日期格式正确，语法无误
表达自然度：使用口语化表达，不冗长

content.speakerText: This is your registration form. Please fill it out before we call you in.
content.speakerTextCn: 这是您的登记表，请在叫号前填写。
expectedAnswers: Sure, I'll fill it out right away.
Okay, I'll complete this form now.
Got it. Do I need to include my insurance number?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：表明理解并愿意配合
语言准确性：使用恰当的回应句式
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合服务场景
